TRAINER_70001.defeatDialogue: I'll see you later after my training arc!
TRAINER_70001.introDialogue: My Rattata is different from regular Rattata. It's like my Rattata is in the top percentage of all Rattata!
TRAINER_70001.name: Joey

TRAINER_70003.introDialogue: Some say I'm not ready. Look at me now, I'm Calvin, and I'm a wall before the League! Ready for a real challenge?
TRAINER_70003.name: Calvin
TRAINER_70003.victoryDialogue: Throughout Heaven and Earth, I alone am the Honored One...

TRAINER_70005.defeatDialogue: youngsters now days have no respect for their elders!
TRAINER_70005.introDialogue: bla bla bla, back in my days bla bla bla great pokemon war bla bla bla...
TRAINER_70005.name: Leader
TRAINER_70005.victoryDialogue: 50 years too early to fight me kid!

TRAINER_70010.defeatDialogue: You Got Lucky Punk!  I was'nt at my full power.
TRAINER_70010.introDialogue: I hope you dont get unlucky and recive full hard mode for this battle
TRAINER_70010.name: Crime Leader
TRAINER_70010.victoryDialogue: Seems like you got full hard mode XD

TRAINER_70012.defeatDialogue: Wahahahah! Well, I won! How was the battle? Thrilling, right?
TRAINER_70012.introDialogue: You look like you have a lot of zip! That's a good thing. Wahahahaha!
TRAINER_70012.name: Leader
TRAINER_70012.victoryDialogue: I swell with optimism, seeing a promising young Trainer like you!

TRAINER_70013.defeatDialogue: You were only living a pipe dream.
TRAINER_70013.name: Sisters Baba and Yaga
TRAINER_70013.victoryDialogue: I guess you were OUR worst nightmare...

TRAINER_70014.introDialogue: I'm happy to serve you, watch out for my sneak attack, he was specially trained with the masters to do feats thought impossible.
TRAINER_70014.name: Brett Leer
TRAINER_70014.victoryDialogue: Very good sir have a reward on me.

TRAINER_70019.defeatDialogue: oofI see you also know about bonds and hard work
TRAINER_70019.introDialogue: I'll show you the efforts of our bonds and hard work
TRAINER_70019.name: Salt
TRAINER_70019.victoryDialogue: I see you also know about bonds and hard work

TRAINER_70021.introDialogue: We trained in the Way of the Psychic Fist.
TRAINER_70021.name: Suggest a name 005
